name: English Steak & Kidney Pie (British Isles)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the skin and coarse parts from the kidneys.
2. Wash in salted water.
3. Cut into 1-inch squares.
4. Pound flour into round steak and cut into pieces.
5. Combine flour, salt, and pepper.
6. Dredge kidney in seasoned flour.
7. Heat oil in a heavy skillet and brown beef cubes on all sides, add onion and kidneys, and cook slowly until brown.
8. Cover meats with hot water, add bay leaf, parsley, and celery tops.
9. Simmer for 1 hour.
10. Remove meat to a deep baking dish.
11. Add mushrooms, carrots.
12. Mix 2 tablespoons flour with 1/2 cup cold water and add to pan liquor to thicken it.
13. Pour over meat and vegetables.
14. Top with pastry crust.
15. Bake in a 350 degree F oven for about 1 hour.
